SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANDY LIAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREW HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIAO, ANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANDREW $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,225.00, ** SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION ** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
